name: Heena
functions: Beautiful day today!

name: Maria
functions: Ahh...I need to get this letter sent...

name: John
functions: How about buying one of these fishes

name: Phil
functions: Open your item inventory and you'll find equip., use, set-up, and etc. and cash tabs.

Double-click on an item in the item inventory and you'll be able to use it

name: Teo
functions: Hey, have you seen a whale around here Hmmm... where did it go ...
Haven't been able to shave in months ... now my chin is starting to itch like crazy

name: Jane
functions: I wanna travel too...

functions: You need a place to store your items and mesos This is just the place for you!

name: Chef

name: Olaf
functions: Huh Hey you come here!

name: Natasha
functions: Let's see...I'm ready to start doing some business here...

name: Mina
functions: Low price! Really loooow!

name: Mai
functions: Do you know me by any chance You don't What's wrong with you

name: Silver
functions: On Sale!! Crazy Prices!!!

name: Mr. Goldstein
functions: Hey, there! Is your buddy list full by any chance

name: Pason
functions: Do you want to head over to Florina Beach

name: Biggs
functions: Hmm...looks like I'm still the best looking man in this town.

name: Yoona
functions: Whoa, what are you looking at ! !

name: Bari
functions: Working hard there~

functions: I am the captain, dang it!! Don't be looking down on me!

name: Pio
functions: Do you need my help by any chance I can handle machinery really well...

name: Rain
functions: Isn't it nice out here today

name: Sid

functions: Have you met up with Athena Pierce, the one that watches over and takes care of our town
